name: Floor & Decor Holdings, Inc.
summary: PARTI . Except where the context suggests otherwise, the terms Floor & Decor Holdings, Inc., Floor & Decor, the Company, we, us, and our refer to Floor & Decor Holdings, Inc., a Delaware corporation, together with its consolidated subsidiaries. Our fiscal year is the 52- or 53-week period ending on the Thursday on or preceding December 31.
